name: classic_single_agent_rag
description: Classic RAG baseline: retrieve top-k chunks and answer directly with one LLM.

name: curated_rag
description: Retrieve top-k chunks, build structured epistemic evidence with Agent 1, then render deterministically without a pedagogical planning agent.

name: granite_planner_with_rendering
description: Retrieve top-k chunks, build structured epistemic evidence with Agent 1, let Granite select the pedagogical plan, then render deterministically.

name: granite_direct_writer_without_rendering
description: Retrieve top-k chunks, build structured epistemic evidence with Agent 1, then let Granite produce the final pedagogical response directly without deterministic rendering.
